transcript.text: Hello I'm in here in some big giant park in Vienna and I just wanted to say that I'm thoroughly

Down the road while I'm laying in bed sleeping you know and it doesn't take that long for me to not
Even hear what I'm listening to when I'm sleeping because I'm tired and I go to sleep but it kind
Of puts me to sleep or relaxes me putting me to sleep and also when I'm like cruising around town
Just like relaxing looking at the sights listening you know like right now I just finished Thomas

And my my ultimate timeline um has a whole bunch of uh audio stuff that I put on my computer and I'm

You know I'm traveling um you know times of boredom or whatever but
But uh I mean
But I mean listening to this stuff it's like it's like I'm going through a
Like getting a college education or whatever and all these things
I'd like to I mean and I have so much stuff that I'm never even going to finish listening to all of
